# Siong Design

Siong Design is a Singapore carpentry company providing kitchen cabinets, wardrobes, TV feature walls, commercial carpentry and quotation support.

Key pages:
- Home: /index.html
- Services: /services.html
- Completed works: /works.html
- Calculator: /calculator.html
- FAQ: /faq.html
- Contact: /contact.html

Business details:

- Address: 71 Woodlands Industrial Park E9 #05-08 A/B, S757048, Wave 9, Singapore
